worldAnalytics.title: 📊 Your Insights & Analysis
worldAnalytics.freeTierBanner: Free: Only last {{days}} days of history
worldAnalytics.upgradeMessage: Upgrade to Premium for unlimited history and deeper insights
worldAnalytics.transparencyDesc: This analysis shows your exact raw data without filtering, manipulation or optimization.
worldAnalytics.methodAverageDesc: Simple arithmetic mean of all your mood scores
worldAnalytics.methodTrendsDesc: Comparison between last 7 days vs previous 7 days
worldAnalytics.methodInsightsDesc: Automatically generated based on simple mathematical thresholds
worldAnalytics.methodNoFilterDesc: All days with/without logs shown exactly as they are
worldAnalytics.insightRule1: "Start tracking your mood": Shown if you have < 3 logs total
worldAnalytics.insightRule3: "Downward trend": Shown if trend is declining
worldAnalytics.simpleRules: These are simple, automatic rules - no AI or complex analysis.
worldAnalytics.autoGenerated: Automatically generated based on your data
worldAnalytics.distributionDesc: 100% honest distribution: Every mood score from your logs is counted exactly once. No approximations, no rounding, no manipulation.
worldAnalytics.weeklyDesc: Honest weekly tracking: Shows exact number of days this week where you logged at least one mood. No bonus points, no extra credits - just your actual logs.
worldAnalytics.percentCalc: Percentage calculated as: (your log days / your goal) × 100
worldAnalytics.trendCalc: Exact calculation: Last 7 days vs previous 7 days
worldAnalytics.trendHowTitle: 🔢 How the trend is calculated (completely honest):
worldAnalytics.noFilterNote: No filters, no smoothing, no manipulation.
worldAnalytics.trendDownWarning: Honest observation: Your last 7 days show lower mood compared to the previous 7 days.
worldAnalytics.trendDownAdvice: If you're feeling down, consider talking to a friend, family member or professional.
worldAnalytics.trendUpNote: Honest observation: Your last 7 days show higher mood compared to the previous 7 days.
worldAnalytics.recTrackDesc: Daily mood tracking helps you understand your patterns and improves your insights over time.
worldAnalytics.recWellnessDesc: Consider mindfulness, exercise or other activities that improve your mood.

insights.startTrackingDesc: Log your mood regularly to get better insights about your patterns.
insights.positiveTrendDesc: Your average mood is high. Keep up the good work!
insights.downwardTrendDesc: Your mood has declined in recent days. Consider talking to someone.
insights.needSupportDesc: Your mood is low. You're not alone - consider professional help.

authLayout.tagline: Your mental health companion in everyday life
authLayout.loginCta: Sign in to continue with mood logging, AI support and personal insights.
authLayout.description: Track your mood, get personal AI support and build sustainable habits at your own pace, together with thousands of others using Calm & Safe.
authLayout.feature1: Your data is protected and never shared without your consent.
authLayout.feature2: Get daily insights, small rewards and support to help you maintain routines over time.
authLayout.feature3: AI support for mental health offering reflection and practical strategies tailored to you.

onboarding.step2Desc: What do you want to achieve?
onboarding.welcomeHeading: Hi! We are glad you are here.
onboarding.welcomeBody: Calm & Safe helps you manage stress, improve your mental health and find calm in your daily life.
onboarding.welcomeNote: With your selected goals we will give you personal recommendations to support your mental health.
onboarding.readyHeading: You are now ready to begin!
onboarding.readyBody: Start with a short meditation or track your current mood to get personal recommendations.
onboarding.maxGoals: You can select up to {{max}} goals
onboarding.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one goal to continue

crisis.infoText: This page shows help resources for everyone who needs support with mental health. You are not alone and professional help is available around the clock.
crisis.adviceText: If you feel that life feels unbearable, call 112 or a crisis line immediately. There is always someone who wants to help you.
crisis.line1Desc: Open 24/7 for acute support and conversation.
crisis.line5Desc: Support for young adults and everyone who needs to talk.
crisis.reminder: Your feelings are important and valid. Seeking help is a sign of strength, not weakness.

navigation.confirmLogout: Are you sure you want to take a break? You can always come back.

breathingPhases.name: exhale
breathingPhases.instruction: Breathe out completely through your mouth...

muscleGroups.name: Feet
muscleGroups.instruction: Curl your toes and tense your arches...
muscleGroups.visual: Imagine curling your toes like a fist and bending your foot upward

muscleGroups.name: Calves
muscleGroups.visual: Tense the muscles at the back of your legs, like when you stand on your toes

muscleGroups.name: Thighs
muscleGroups.visual: Squeeze the front of your thighs, like when you kick forward

muscleGroups.name: Abdomen
muscleGroups.visual: Pull your stomach in as if protecting yourself from a blow

muscleGroups.name: Chest and shoulders
muscleGroups.instruction: Tense your chest and raise your shoulders...
muscleGroups.visual: Hold your breath and tense your chest, raise shoulders toward your ears

muscleGroups.name: Arms
muscleGroups.visual: Tense your biceps and triceps, make your arms stiff like wooden planks

muscleGroups.name: Forearms and hands
muscleGroups.instruction: Tense your forearms and clench your fists...
muscleGroups.visual: Clench your fists tightly and tense the muscles in your forearms

muscleGroups.name: Neck and throat
muscleGroups.instruction: Tense your neck and pull in your chin...
muscleGroups.visual: Press your head back against a pillow and tense your neck muscles

muscleGroups.name: Face
muscleGroups.visual: Squeeze your eyes shut, wrinkle your forehead, clench your jaw and lips

stress-1.title: 4-7-8 Breathing Exercise
stress-1.description: Dr. Andrew Weil's scientifically proven method for anxiety and sleep
stress-1.content: This technique activates the parasympathetic nervous system and lowers cortisol levels by up to 30%.

stress-2.title: CBT Exercise: Managing Stressful Thoughts
stress-2.description: Identify and challenge stress thought patterns
stress-2.content: Learn to recognize stress triggers and how to manage them better.

stress-3.title: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
stress-3.content: 15-minute guided exercise to release tension in your body.

sleep-1.title: The Science Behind Better Sleep
sleep-1.description: Understand how to improve your sleep quality
sleep-1.content: Learn scientifically proven methods for better sleep.

sleep-2.title: Sleep Meditation: Body Scan
sleep-2.content: A body scan meditation specially designed for sleep problems.

sleep-3.title: 7-Day Sleep Routine
sleep-3.content: Establish healthy sleep habits over a week.

focus-1.title: Pomodoro Technique for Better Focus
focus-1.description: Scientifically proven time management technique for optimal productivity
focus-1.content: The Pomodoro technique leverages natural 90-120 minute cycles of high and low performance.

focus-2.title: Mindfulness for Focus
focus-2.description: Scientifically proven MBSR meditation for improved concentration
focus-2.content: This guided mindfulness meditation is based on the MBSR program by Dr. Jon Kabat-Zinn.

focus-3.title: Neuroscience: How Focus Works
focus-3.description: In-depth understanding of the brain's attention system
focus-3.content: Article on neuroscientific mechanisms behind attention and concentration.

clarity-1.title: Clarity Meditation
clarity-1.description: Clear your mind and increase mental clarity

clarity-2.title: Journaling for Mental Clarity
clarity-2.description: Write your way to clearer thinking
clarity-2.content: Structured journaling method to organize your thoughts.

clarity-3.title: Digital Detox for Mental Clarity
clarity-3.content: Reduce screen time for increased mental clarity.

mindfulness-1.title: Mindfulness for Beginners
mindfulness-1.description: Learn the basics of mindfulness in 10 minutes
mindfulness-1.content: A guided introduction to mindfulness meditation.

mindfulness-2.title: Body Scan Meditation
mindfulness-2.description: Scan through your body for deep relaxation
mindfulness-2.content: A 20-minute body scan to release tension and stress.

mindfulness-3.title: 5-4-3-2-1 Senses Exercise
mindfulness-3.description: Grounding technique for anxiety and stress
mindfulness-3.content: Use your senses to return to the present moment.

sleep-4.title: Sleep Preparation Ritual
sleep-4.description: Prepare for deep sleep with guided relaxation
sleep-4.content: A 15-minute ritual to help you wind down and prepare for sleep.

sleep-5.title: Screen Time and Sleep
sleep-5.description: How blue light affects your sleep quality
sleep-5.content: Scientific overview of how screen time affects melatonin production.

social-1.title: Communication in Relationships
social-1.content: Learn active listening and assertive communication.

social-2.title: Daily Feeling Sharing
social-2.description: Share your feelings with someone you trust
social-2.content: Practice expressing feelings openly and honestly every day for a week.

work-1.title: Workplace Stress Management
work-1.content: Strategies for handling deadlines, conflicts and workload.

work-2.title: Focus Meditation for Work
work-2.content: A meditation designed to improve focus and work performance.

advanced-1.title: Cognitive Restructuring
advanced-1.description: Advanced CBT technique for thought patterns
advanced-1.content: Learn to identify and restructure deep negative thought patterns.

advanced-2.title: Vipassana Meditation
advanced-2.description: Deep mindfulness practice for experienced practitioners
advanced-2.content: Traditional vipassana technique for awareness and insight.

generic-1.title: 7-Day Gratitude Challenge
generic-1.description: Develop a more positive outlook through daily gratitude
generic-1.content: Write down three things you are grateful for every day for a week.

generic-2.title: Mental Health 101
generic-2.content: An overview of important concepts in mental health and wellbeing.

pmr.prepareDesc: Sit or lie comfortably. Breathe calmly.
pmr.relaxDesc: Release the tension slowly and feel the relaxation...
pmr.completedDesc: Well done! You have completed progressive muscle relaxation.
pmr.guideDesc: Follow the guide through different muscle groups for deep relaxation

catastrophizing.label: Catastrophizing
catastrophizing.hint: The thought predicts the worst possible outcome without middle-ground scenarios.
catastrophizing.reframeQuestion: What is the most likely outcome, not the worst?

black_white.label: Black-and-white thinking
black_white.hint: The thought uses extremes like "always", "never" or "completely".
black_white.reframeQuestion: What more nuanced middle ground could be true?

mind_reading.label: Mind reading
mind_reading.hint: The thought assumes what others think without clear evidence.
mind_reading.reframeQuestion: What actual evidence do you have for what others are thinking?

self_labeling.label: Global self-labeling
self_labeling.hint: A mistake is turned into a general label about you as a person.
self_labeling.reframeQuestion: How would you describe the situation without labeling yourself?

noData.title: Continued reflection
noData.message: You have done important work. Continued repetition of the balanced thought can make it more accessible in everyday life.

clearRestructuring.title: Clear restructuring
clearRestructuring.message: Your new thought feels considerably more credible now. This indicates you have broken an automatic stress interpretation pattern.

goodProgress.title: Good progress
goodProgress.message: You are moving in the right direction. Keep practicing the new thought in similar situations to consolidate the effect.

stabilization.title: Stabilization needed
stabilization.message: Change takes time. Try to concretize the evidence further and try the same exercise again in a calm moment.

noData.title: Stress measurement missing
noData.message: Add stress level before and after next time to more clearly see the effect of the exercise.

clearReduction.title: Clear stress reduction
clearReduction.message: Your stress level dropped significantly. Continue with the same strategy in similar situations.

goodRegulation.title: Good stress regulation
goodRegulation.message: Stress level decreased. Repeat the remaining action steps to consolidate the effect.

remaining.title: Stress partially remains
remaining.message: If stress is still high, combine the thought with a short breathing pause before the next step.

sleepStories.title: Star Journey
sleepStories.description: Calm bedtime story for winding down

sleepStories.title: Ocean Breath
sleepStories.description: Deep rest with ocean rhythm and guidance
